title: hypericum mutilum var. parviflorum
intro: Hypericum mutilum var. parviflorum, also known as St. John's Wort dwarf or small-flowered St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the St. John's Wort genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hypericum mutilum var. parviflorum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
